incoming.description: Images that have not been reviewed yet.

reference_only.description: Inspiration images that should not be used directly.

approved_personal_wallpaper.description: Images approved for private/personal wallpaper use only.

approved_photos_widget.description: Images approved for private/personal Photos widget use only.

approved_presentation_safe.description: Images approved for classroom/public presentation backgrounds.

rejected_or_hold.description: Unclear, questionable, duplicate, low-quality, or not-yet-approved images.

business_or_commercial.note: Requires explicit review/licensing outside this scaffold.

commercial_3d_printing.note: Requires explicit IP/licensing review before any product or sale use.

default_rules: Anime, Reddit, fan-art, and character images default to reference_only.
Unclear source defaults to rejected_or_hold or reference_only.
Public or commercial use requires explicit review/licensing.
Classroom presentation use requires approved_presentation_safe approval.
Personal wallpaper/widget use can be approved locally after human review.
